theme.description: Deep obsidian backgrounds with vibrant neon gradients (mint/teal & indigo/purple) to signify growth, premium status, and AI capabilities. Glassmorphism is used sparingly for floating navs and modal overlays.

hierarchy.h1_balance: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-white to-gray-400

layout_and_spacing.app_container: mobile-first layout: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0D1117] overflow-x-hidden relative shadow-2xl
layout_and_spacing.gap: gap-4 for lists, gap-6 for major sections

bottom_navigation.position: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md mx-auto z-50
bottom_navigation.style: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0D1117]/80 border-t border-white/10 pb-safe pt-3 px-6 flex justify-between items-center rounded-t-3xl

buttons.primary: w-full rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00D09C] to-[#00B4D8] text-white font-semibold py-4 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,208,156,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,208,156,0.5)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: w-full rounded-2xl bg-[#161B22] border border-white/10 text-white font-medium py-4 hover:bg-white/5
buttons.icon_button: p-3 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10

inputs.style: w-full bg-[#0D1117] border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3.5 text-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:border-[#00B4D8] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00B4D8] transition-all

gauges_and_charts.spending_score: SVG-based half-donut gauge chart. Red (0-40) -> Yellow (41-70) -> Green (71-100). Use stroke-linecap='round'.
gauges_and_charts.trend_charts: Recharts. Use gradient stroke for line. Hide axis lines and grids for a clean, premium look.

ai_insights_card.style: relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl p-5 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#161B22] to-[#1a1c29] border border-[#6366F1]/30
ai_insights_card.decoration: Add a subtle purple/indigo blurred blob in the background. Use sparkle icon.
ai_insights_card.copy_tone: Hindi/English mixed, witty e.g. 'Swiggy aapka best friend ban gaya 😂. This week you spent ₹4,500 on food delivery!'

testing_and_accessibility.mandatory_attributes: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, tab triggers, and cards MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='transaction-item').
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 text contrast. Do not use dark gray text on black backgrounds.
testing_and_accessibility.motion: Use Framer Motion for screen transitions (slide up/fade in). Spring animations for card presses.

images.description: Gold achievement badge for Budget Master
Flame graphic for No Spend Streak

instructions_to_main_agent: Since the stack is React JS + Tailwind, simulate the mobile app UI by wrapping the main application in a mobile-sized container (`max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative overflow-hidden`).
For the bottom tab navigation, implement it as a sticky/fixed footer component inside the mobile container.
Implement Shadcn components but heavily customize them. Remove standard Shadcn borders and apply the dark fintech theme (e.g., bg-[#161B22] border-white/5).
Implement all specific views: Auth (Login/Signup/Google), Dashboard, Transactions, Budgets, Insights, and Profile/Settings.
For the AI Insights component, make sure to include the Hindi tone example specified.
Remember to include `data-testid` on EVERY clickable or important informational element.
Make use of `framer-motion` to add premium micro-interactions (e.g., gauge filling up, cards sliding in on mount).
